title: Super Mario Bros. 3
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A small agile explorer in side view in a theatrical side-scrolling platform course with layered block islands, suspended platforms, and open sky, caught in a clean upward leap over a gap.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- NES aesthetic, limited palette, simple iconic forms, crisp outlines, and strong silhouette readability
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- playful, nimble, bright

Composition:
- single explorer only, side-view read, one jump arc, no crowd, no abstract stripes
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Mario likeness, avoid mustache and hat codes, avoid official mushrooms or stars, avoid purely graphic stripe backgrounds, avoid resemblance to mario. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Mario likeness, avoid mustache and hat codes, avoid official mushrooms or stars, avoid purely graphic stripe backgrounds, avoid resemblance to mario
revised_prompt: Create an original illustration inspired by old school platformer games. The central figure should be a small, agile explorer depicted from a side view, mid-leap over a gap in a side-scrolling platform course. The course should be depicted with layered block 'islands', floating platforms, and an open sky. The style of the image should feel distinctly retro, referencing a NES aesthetic: a limited color palette, simple iconic forms, crisp outlines, and an easily discernible silhouette. Despite the retro inspiration, give the image a clean and modern interpretation, using either pixel art or stylized rendering as appropriate. The overall mood should be playful, bright, and nimble. This scene should be clear and uncluttered, with strong contrast, minimal noise, and no use of text or watermarks. The image should avoid any direct allusions to existing copyrighted characters or game assets, instead presenting an original representation of the genre and atmosphere of early platformer games.
